response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, there is no evidence of recent, sustained C++ development, STL usage, multi-threading, or IEC 62443 compliance required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
Proven ability to build event-driven, scalable systems and open-source tools with real-world adoption.
Excellent communication and mentoring skills demonstrated through workshops and technical leadership.
concerns: No recent C++ or STL work in the last 9+ years; core technical requirement not met.
Lacks demonstrated experience with message brokers, MQTT, REST in industrial contexts, or IEC 62443 security standards.
No exposure to cloud platforms (Azure), industrial protocols (OPC UA, Modbus), or on-premises automation systems.
